# Hari Krishnan

> Frontend architect and trainer running advanced Angular and React workshops and corporate training for engineering teams.

Hari Krishnan is a frontend JavaScript lead with 12+ years of industry experience, specializing in enterprise Angular and React architecture, RxJS, signals, monorepos, SSR, and web performance. He delivers intensive masterclasses for senior engineering teams.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, experience timeline, workshops, testimonials, and contact.
- [Courses](/courses): Catalog of advanced Angular and React courses.
- [Angular Masterclass](/courses/angular-masterclass): Reactive patterns, signal-first architecture, Nx monorepos, and performance for senior Angular teams.
- [React Performance](/courses/react-performance): Concurrent mode internals, memory leak forensics, Server Components, and streaming SSR.
